metadata.description: End-to-end prompt engineering platform. Create, optimize, test, harden, and translate prompts across 64 models with multi-agent pipelines.

plugins.name: prompt-crafter
plugins.description: Creates production-ready prompts with technique selection, model fitting, and multi-agent convergence pipeline.

plugins.name: prompt-refiner
plugins.description: Improves existing prompts with diagnosis, convergence engine, and multi-agent review.

plugins.name: convergence-engine
plugins.description: Autonomous prompt optimizer. Up to 100 iterations with hypothesis-driven fixes, binary assertions, and auto-revert.

plugins.name: prompt-tester
plugins.description: Executes tests.json against model output. Pass/fail assertions, regression testing, CI/CD compatible.

plugins.name: prompt-harden
plugins.description: Tests prompts against 12 adversarial attack patterns. Reports vulnerabilities, suggests defenses. OWASP LLM Top 10.

plugins.name: prompt-translate
plugins.description: Converts prompts between models. Claude to GPT, GPT to Gemini, any to o-series. Preserves intent, adapts format.
